title: ToolTreaux Aluminum Jar Storage Tin Case, 1/2 Oz Container and Display Set
description:
Keep small parts, crafts, spices, jewelry, or minerals organized with the ToolTreaux Aluminum Storage Jar Container Set! The ToolTreaux Aluminum Jar Storage Container Sets are a great addition to any craft set, hobby station, or kitchen. Featuring either 12, 15 or 20 aluminum containers with clear glass lids, you'll be able to organize all of your small items - jewelry, cosmetics, spices, crafting supplies, tool pieces, hardware, and more! Each jar uses a twist off lid so you can safely secure everything inside. Because the top is constructed with a clear glass window, you'll easily be able to tell your items apart without having to label the containers. All of the jars fit conveniently within the included aluminum case, allowing for easy transportation and organization

ToolTreaux Aluminum Jar Storage Tin Case, 1/2 Oz Container and Display Set

Keep small parts, crafts, spices, jewelry, or minerals organized with the ToolTreaux Aluminum Storage Jar Container Set!

Key Features

  • DURABLE ALUMINUM BODY - Each jar is made of lightweight and durable aluminum to ensure they are reusable and last for years
  • CLEAR TOP - The press-top lids have a clear glass window so you can easily find and organize the items you need
  • PERFECT FOR HOBBIES - These jars make a great accessory to any hobby, allowing you to store, organize, and display small parts and pieces such as gems, stamps, coins, and more
  • DISPLAY AND CARRY CASE - Each set comes with an aluminum, foam-lined case to store the jars, making it easy to display, transport, and organize with minimal space
  • SPECIFICATIONS: 12 Piece Set; Dimensions: 1.25 x 1.25 x 0.75 inches; Capacity: 0.5 fl Oz; Color: Silver; Material: Aluminum, Glass

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UHASC-VAR-199
  • UPC: 810058482815
  • Color: Silver
